name: Women outnumber men 10000:1
description: In a world where the gender dynamics have shifted significantly due to there being only 1 man to every 10000 women, you live in a society that has adapted to accommodate these differences. The global government has introduced an explicit law allowing sex anywhere to help ensure humanity doesn't go extinct due to the lack of men. After not having participated in society something has changed and you are compelled to do so
creator: desegg
